data.title: Add feature-intent detection guidance to using-lockpick SKILL.md and HOOK-INJECTION.md
data.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md contains a Feature Intent Detection section with explicit signal patterns
  Verify: grep -q "Feature Intent Detection\|feature-intent detection" plugins/dso/skills/using-lockpick/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md lists explicit signals: new feature, create an epic, I want to build
  Verify: grep -q "new feature" plugins/dso/skills/using-lockpick/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md lists implicit signals: proposals for significant new capabilities or architectural changes
  Verify: grep -q "significant.*capabilities\|architectural.*change\|implicit" plugins/dso/skills/using-lockpick/SKILL.md
- [ ] HOOK-INJECTION.md contains matching feature-intent detection guidance
  Verify: grep -q "feature.*intent\|brainstorm" plugins/dso/skills/using-lockpick/HOOK-INJECTION.md
- [ ] Guidance is scoped to brainstorm-enforcement only (no sub-agent routing guidance — owned by dso-khl2)
  Verify: { grep -q "sub-agent routing\|subagent routing\|dso-khl2" plugins/dso/skills/using-lockpick/SKILL.md; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] Existing EnterPlanMode brainstorm enforcement flowchart is reconciled (enhanced, not duplicated)
  Verify: python3 -c "
content = open('plugins/dso/skills/using-lockpick/SKILL.md').read()
count = content.lower().count('feature intent detection')
assert count <= 2, f'Duplicate section detected: {count} occurrences'
print('PASS')
"

## Implementation Details
1. In SKILL.md, enhance the existing EnterPlanMode brainstorm enforcement section (lines 25-38 flowchart area) with a Feature Intent Detection subsection containing:
   - Explicit signals: "new feature", "create an epic", "I want to build", "add a capability"
   - Implicit signals: proposals for significant new capabilities, architectural changes, cross-cutting concerns
   - Action: invoke /dso:brainstorm before entering plan mode
2. In HOOK-INJECTION.md, add matching condensed feature-intent detection guidance
3. Scope to brainstorm-enforcement only — do NOT add sub-agent routing guidance (owned by epic dso-khl2)

## TDD Requirement
RED tests from previous task must pass (GREEN) after these changes.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/using-lockpick/SKILL.md (modify)
- plugins/dso/skills/using-lockpick/HOOK-INJECTION.md (modify)
